sourceMovie.title: The Medium
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: The Medium works as a horror movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The horror and thriller blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Countdown
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If The Medium clicked for you, Countdown (2019) is a strong next stop: both trade in horror and thriller, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after The Medium?
faq.answer: Try Countdown, Shutter, V/H/S/2—each shares DNA with The Medium while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is The Medium?
faq.answer: The Medium (2021) is best described as Horror, Thriller. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is The Medium worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 7.0/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this horror lane.
